About the property

A sanctuary above
the city's rhythm

"Built with patience, designed with care — so every guest feels truly at home."

House of ReeKa is a spacious top-floor 4BHK retreat in the heart of Gurgaon's Sector 84. Designed for families, groups, and business travellers, it offers bright bedrooms, modern bathrooms, a cozy dining space, and balconies with peaceful park views.

The entire home is exclusively yours — with full privacy, daily housekeeping, caretaker service from 8AM–7:30PM, and a 60-inch smart TV with Netflix, Amazon Prime and Apple TV.

✈️
Transit Stays
